Use Python to inspect the evidence, refine that world model from the newest history, and search or score candidate actions or short sequences against the current goal as you currently understand it.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: RIGHT moved the player again. Let me check the new position and continue mapping the chambers.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position after second RIGHT
before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

def find_player(seg):
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24 and n['children']:
            return n
    return None

bp = find_player(before_seg)
ap = find_player(after_seg)
print(f"Player: {bp['boundary'][0] if bp else '?'} -> {ap['boundary'][0] if ap else '?'}")
print(f"Full boundary: {ap['boundary'] if ap else '?'}")

# Check if only HUD changed or player moved too
changed_ids = []
before_nodes = {n['hash']: n for n in before_seg['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['hash']: n for n in after_seg['nodes']}
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['hash'] not in before_nodes:
        changed_ids.append(n['id'])
    elif before_nodes[n['hash']]['boundary'] != n['boundary']:
        changed_ids.append(n['id'])
print(f"Changed node ids: {changed_ids}")
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"RIGHT": "moves player right between chambers", "DOWN": "only shrinks HUD timer"}, "object_taxonomy": {"blue_square_black_center": "player avatar (4x4)", "blue_square_blue_center": "target/goal", "bottom_blue_strip": "HUD timer"}, "hud_map": {"row_63": "blue timer strip"}, "win_pattern": {}, "level_log": {}, "cross_level_notes": {}}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "Player moves right between chambers in top row. Currently at second chamber.", "goal_model": "Navigate to blue target at bottom right", "recent_findings": ["RIGHT works, DOWN only affects timer"], "open_questions": ["How many chambers right? When can we go down?"], "current_plan": "Continue RIGHT until blocked, then try DOWN", "strategy_log": [], "failed_probes": ["DOWN at [8,20] - no movement"]}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

Let me try RIGHT once more, then try DOWN from the next position.
